_value.title: Micron (MU) Earnings After The Bell: What To Expect | Investing.com
_value.description: The long-term outlook for this company remains strong. MU is being valued at a 19.5x forward P/E, which is on the higher side of the firm’s 5-year trend.Look for management’s forward guidance and sentiment during this report and call, as this will likely be the driver of a share price action.
